paragraphs.text: PC/console/telephoon games are sold and demolished at the moment after a few months/years by pressurised online component in single player games/full online games. because the publishers/creators are no longer making a profit, and thus the plug, for example, hosting the server and/or completely removing from sales/tied account online shop (steam. ubisoft.playstation, etc.) because the game in question did not have enough players/did not make enough profit and is therefore destroyed without any retention of ownership of a game in question, it does not matter whether a game is single player/vocal online games are destroyed without good reason! would like to see the next if we buy a game and the publisher/maker of a Spell can/will no longer support. At least one way is that we can continue to use our purchased product in a playable state and not destroy it! By giving a privileged image to disable the online server in a single player game (game)/or remove online games (games) DRM, or ideally give the option to host our own public community servers for an online Spell after a game end or life has been lost let by the publisher! to enable us to keep up what we bought in short, we want there to be an end of life plan like a game like the plug, so that we can keep a working game in a playable state.
